---
title: "Forecasting of Jack mackerel landings (Trachurus murphyi) in central-southern Chile through neural networks"
author: "Naranjo, L.; Plaza, F.; Yáñez, E.; Barbieri, M. A.; Sánchez, F."
date: '2015-01-01'
date-format: "YYYY"
slug: jack-mackerel-landings-neural-networks
categories:
  - Investigación
  - Redes neuronales
  - Pesquerías
description: "Pronóstico de desembarques de jurel en Chile centro-sur mediante redes neuronales."
image: cover.png
lang: es
format:
  html:
    image: cover.png
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Figura representativa:** reemplazar `cover.png` por una figura del artículo o subir material complementario a `figures/`.
:::

## Cita

Naranjo, L., Plaza, F., Yáñez, E., Barbieri, M. A., & Sánchez, F. (2015). Forecasting of Jack mackerel landings (*Trachurus murphyi*) in central-southern Chile through neural networks. *Fisheries Oceanography*, 24(3), 219-228.
